slice_name: Tag a client project with a label

inherited_oracle.note: Skeleton + S4 greens frozen-verified at their build; inherited by reference (H14). Not re-run here, EXCEPT the scoped regression layer (AC6) which re-runs by reference under the feature-add regression guard.

tests.trace: set_label persists the additive label field on the existing project record via C1 by reusing update_project (CT2 extension, A14); the persisted label equals the submitted text; StoreUnavailableError/ConstraintViolationError propagate unmodified — every assertion satisfied. Inherited CT2 BASE shape test (OCT-CT2, S4) NOT re-run (frozen, H14).

POST projects/<slug>/label → _view_set_project_label resolves session via C2 (CT3) → C3 ProjectLabeler.set_label persists label via C1 (CT2 extension) → label renders in list (AC11); label still holds value on reload, linked to same project (AC13); failure: StoreUnavailableError propagates → 503, label not persisted.

visible.trace: freelancer sets label 'client-acme' on project 'Acme Website', saves → stored label field holds the text and renders on the project in the list.

held_out.trace: same property with DIFFERENT unguessable label 'vip-zeta' + project 'Zeta Analytics' + session/freelancer → label persists + renders; not hardcoded to the visible label (B7).

visible.trace: after setting label 'archived-delta' on 'Delta Co' and navigating away, on return the project's label field still holds the value, linked to the same project.

held_out.trace: same persist-across-navigation property with DIFFERENT unguessable label 'lead-omega' / project 'Omega Ltd' / session → still holds; not hardcoded to the visible case (B7).

class_ext.note: feature-add — slice oracle materialized the MANDATORY scoped regression layer (BF4). See top-level regression block for the per-AC verdict.

nfr.note: slice nfr-mechanisms.json mechanisms == [] — label field is non-auth additive data; new_mechanisms == []; no M* requires a wiring check (MAP-NFR). NFR layer passes vacuously.

regression.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 (create + manage projects, parent of the tagged project) + integration_seam C1/CT2 (label additive on the project record); NOT the whole inherited suite (Risk R4)

results.trace: create-and-manage-project suite still green: set_label is additive on the project record (reuses update_project with a new key); project create / list / edit / delete paths unchanged by the label field; entries without a label still round-trip. Baseline AC6 visible + held_out both still pass.

skeleton_fidelity.note: Slice ladder verified on the slice oracle (CT2-LABEL, F5, AC11/AC13) + scoped regression (AC6 by reference). No frozen skeleton/S4 test re-run/re-greened, no composition root baseline route edited (S5 route appended only), no baseline regression test mutated. Baseline untouched (H14/BF1).
